source.title: Evaluating Deep Research Agents on Expert Consulting Work: A Benchmark with Verifiers, Rubrics, and Cognitive Traps

paper_artifacts.verification: Confirmed a valid 21-page PDF and inspected extracted title/abstract, reproducibility statement, task-design/cognitive-trap section, evaluation-framework discussion, results, limitations, and appendices. No Unicode replacement characters were present. This is acquisition verification, not a deep review.

released_code.inspection: Safely enumerated and extracted the archive to a temporary directory. It contains the DRA response-generation framework, adapters, MCP corpus/results services, export utilities, and test files. The linked snapshot does not contain the 70-prompt corpus, grading workbook, deterministic verifier specifications, rubric scoring implementation, or benchmark results claimed as public/releasable in the paper. The paper itself says the dataset will be released on publication. Reviewers must treat those artifacts as unavailable in this acquired snapshot rather than infer their contents.

acquisition_scope: Primary-source and linked-code acquisition only; no deep review claimed.
